raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Participation in sports provides great benefits and growth opportunities for children physically, socially, emotionally, and mentally.",
    "Children who participate in sports interact with other students from a wide range of ethnic and socio-economic backgrounds, which exposes them to diversity and expands their worldview.",
    "Participating in sports boosts self-esteem and confidence in children and contributes to them being healthier, more well-rounded individuals.",
    "The shutdown of team sports due to COVID-19 has significantly impacted student athletes.",
    "Since the COVID-19 shutdown of football, there have been 1,087 players ruled ineligible, 253 players dropping out of school, 64 becoming incarcerated, 85 joining gangs, and 38 becoming new fathers.",
    "The impacts of the shutdown of sports likely extend beyond the football program to encompass all students participating in school sports."
  ]
}
```
